libraryPreparationPreflight.agent_guidance: Ensure generated native test runtime configuration sets `-Dsun.misc.unsafe.memory.access=allow` and `-Dio.netty.tryReflectionSetAccessible=true` for `io.vertx:vertx-web-client:5.0.1` on Java 25/current-defaults native runs. Existing local server/client tests are appropriate; use in-process Vert.x HTTP servers rather than external services.

input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #7998 [Automation] native-image run fails for io.vertx:vertx-web-client:5.0.1; label=fails-native-image-run; body_chars=8015

risks: `vertx-web-client` exposes optional OAuth2 APIs backed by `io.vertx:vertx-auth-oauth2`, but that dependency is not needed unless the generated tests intentionally exercise `OAuth2WebClient`.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: No extra Maven dependency or Docker service is required for meaningful Vert.x Web Client coverage, but 5.0.1 still resolves Netty 4.2.x and needs the same Java 25 native-runtime system properties that the existing 5.0.0 scaffold applies only to 5.0.0.
